variant_descriptions.G1: threshold: 1[a_i^T h(x) > theta_i], theta_i calibrated on val at FPR=1%
variant_descriptions.G2: retrieval: top-k_r by a_i^T h(x); verdict at k_r=5; report {1,5,20,100}
variant_descriptions.G3: learned per-fact head sigma(w_i^T h(x) + b_i); affirm-only train
variant_descriptions.G4: G3 with negation/question/counterfactual hard-negatives in val/test ONLY (AC5)
variant_descriptions.G5: mixture: G2 retrieval -> G3 confidence weighting (trained jointly)

negation_templates_val_test: It is false to say that {prompt}

anti_cheat.AC1_no_target_to_gate: gate trainer asserts target_new/target_true id NOT in any input tensor passed to optimizer
anti_cheat.AC2_occupancy_bounded: mean over test prompts of (sum_i g_i(x))/N in [0.02, 0.30]
anti_cheat.AC3_gate_off_must_lose: gate-off Φ1 must be at least 0.5 nats below gate-on
anti_cheat.AC4_disjoint_paraphrase_pools: hash check at script start; 4 disjoint paraphrase pools (train, val, test, holdout)
anti_cheat.AC5_no_negation_in_train: loader.forbid_templates blocks 5 negation templates; runtime assert
anti_cheat.AC6_k_r_sweep_reported: verdict at predeclared k_r=5; all {1,5,20,100} reported regardless
anti_cheat.AC7_length_bucket_uniformity: bin prompts by token-length quartile; Φ1 uplift in each bin reported (not relied on for pass)
anti_cheat.AC8_w_norm_std_min: std over facts of ||w_i|| must be > 0.1 (gate head not collapsing)
